blockingIssues.description: Current HEAD still leaves the `pe-terminal-open` audit gate satisfiable via a private report merely provided to BETTER, so the proof gate is not consistently externally observable/investor-verifiable under VAL-ROADMAP-016.

Current HEAD still leaves the `re-enterprise-data` proof gate dependent on a private signed agreement plus internal usage evidence, so the gate remains non-observable externally under VAL-ROADMAP-016.

Current HEAD still has no concrete runtime smoothness evidence from an actually active enhanced desktop motion session; the latest recorded desktop observation remains fallback-only (`data-visual-state=fallback`, `data-motion-layers=0`), so the runtime-smoothness half of VAL-VISUAL-025 remains unresolved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require transcript-visible `.factory/library/*.md` reads before content-model edits, or an explicit handoff deviation when workers proceed without them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The round-3 review for `investor-roadmap-execution-plan-coverage-and-proof-gate-observability-fix` again found no transcript-visible library read before the first edit while the handoff still reported `followedProcedure=true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat the prior frontend-experience-worker guidance about requiring headed/GPU-capable enhanced-path evidence for VAL-VISUAL-025.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-addressed by current HEAD changes to `.factory/skills/frontend-experience-worker/SKILL.md` in commit `1bbe15f`
